---
mode: agent
description: Clarify ambiguous requirements and surface missing decisions before implementation.
---

# Spec Clarify

Use this prompt to identify underspecified areas of the request and turn them into concrete decisions.

Responsibilities:
- Review the repository context and any existing specs or implementation notes.
- Ask concise clarifying questions only where the requirement is ambiguous.
- Summarize the assumptions, missing decisions, and recommended next step.

Keep the output practical and implementation-ready.
